data.title: 国际服主线Vol.3 第四章中篇更新
data.summary: [Update Preview] 1/3 (Tue), the Main Story Volume 3, Eden Treaty Chapter 4's 'Kyrie of the Forgotten
data.body:
[Update Preview]

1/3 (Tue), the Main Story Volume 3, Eden Treaty Chapter 4's 'Kyrie of the Forgotten Gods' Part 2 will launch.
The Arius Squad is headed to the Arius District to stop the ritual. Will they succeed?

#BlueArchive![Gn2N5R8YpZlhLLKjBIkrEXtIqgouKcI2.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/Gn2N5R8YpZlhLLKjBIkrEXtIqgouKcI2.jpg)
